title: Jadestone Gems
description:
Vanilla + Style mod that adds Jadestone and Violite to the game.
Also No New Updates Because I lost the Files
(Also my first ever mod so it's not that good)
body:
Vanilla + style mod that adds the following to the game:

Jadestone Ore, Impure Jadestone, Jadestone Dust, Jadestone, Jadestone Block, Condensed Jadestone Gem, Jadestone Rod, Jadestone Log, Jadestone Leaves.
Full Jadestone toolset
Full Empowered Jadestone toolset
Jadestone Armor
Violite Ore, Encased Violite, Violite Shard, Violite Ingot, Violite Block, Condensed Violite Gem.
Full Violite toolset
Full Empowered Violite toolset
Violite Armor

Note: Jadestone Rod has no use.

How to get started: There is 2 ways to get Jadestone, either by finding it underground and mining in with a Netherite Pickaxe (Jungle Biome only) or getting it from a wandering trader for the overpriced price of 64 emeralds. This however is only Impure Jadestone and needs to be smelted into Jadestone Dust in a Blast Furnace and then crafted in a 2 by 2 space to a get a pure Jadestone gem. From here everything related to Jadestone uses the normal recipe but with Jadestone and Blaze Rods instead of Sticks. Violite can only be found in deepslate Y levels and only have 1 vein per chunk (Average of 3 ore per vein). This will give you Encased Violite that needs to put into a Stone Cutter to get a Violite Shard, these can be crafted in a 3 by 3 space to get a Violite Ingot. Putting a Jadestone tool and Violite Ingot into a smithing table will create a Violite tool.
